A

askIndex() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Prompts the user to select a card from the registered cards in the Pokedex.
askIndex() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Prompts the user to select a card from the registered cards in the Pokedex.

C

calculateUniquePokemonRarities() - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Calculates the number of unique Pokémon rarities in the Pokedex.
calculateUniquePokemonTypes() - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Calculates the number of unique Pokémon types in the Pokedex.
Card - Class in model
Description: Card class represents a Pokemon trading card with its properties.
Card(String, Type, Rarity, String, String, double) - Constructor for class model.Card
Description: Constructs a Card object with the specified properties.
checkCardId(String) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Checks if a card with the given ID already exists in the Pokedex.
checkIndex(int) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Validates if an index is within the valid range of the Pokedex ArrayList.
checkRarity(String) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Checks that the string myRarity is a valid Rarity.
checkType(String) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Checks that the string myType is a valid Type.
clearConsole() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Clears the console screen after confirming user wants to return to the main menu.
clearConsole() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Clears the console screen after confirming user wants to return to the main menu.
Controller - Class in model
Description: The Controller class manages a collection of Pokémon cards (Pokedex).
Controller() - Constructor for class model.Controller
Description: Initializes a new Controller with an empty Pokedex ArrayList.
countByTypeAndRarity(Type, Rarity, ArrayList<Card>) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Calculates the count of cards by the type and rarity given.
countMostFrequentType(ArrayList<Card>) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Calculates the Pokémon type with the most cards registered in the Pokedex.

D

deleteCard(int) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Deletes a card from the Pokedex by setting it to null.
deleteCard() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Allows the user to delete a card from the Pokedex.
deleteCard() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Allows the user to delete a card from the Pokedex.

E

Executable - Class in ui
Description: Executable class represents the user interface and main controller of the PokeCollector application.
Executable - Class in ui
Description: Executable class represents the user interface and main controller of the PokeCollector application.
Executable() - Constructor for class ui.Executable
Description: Initializes a new Executable instance with a Scanner for user input and a Controller for managing card operations.
Executable() - Constructor for class ui.Executable
Description: Initializes a new Executable instance with a Scanner for user input and a Controller for managing card operations.

G

generateID(Rarity) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Generates a unique ID based on the rarity of a Pokémon card.
generateMatrix() - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Generates a 4x4 matrix filled with random integers (as Strings) between 0 and 9.
generateMatrixByType(ArrayList<Card>) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Generates a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type.
generateMatrixByTypeAndRarity(ArrayList<Card>) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Generates a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type and rarity.
getCardInformation(int) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific card in the Pokedex.
getExpansion() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns the expansion set of the card.
getId() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns the unique identification number of the card.
getName() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns the name of the card.
getPokedexByType() - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Gets a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type.
getPokedexByTypeAndRarity() - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Gets a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type and rarity.
getPokedexInformation() - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Retrieves formatted information about all cards in the Pokedex.
getPrice() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns the price of the card.
getRarity() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns the rarity level of the card.
getType() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns the type of the card.

L

loadTestData() - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Loads test data into the Pokedex for demonstration purposes.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ui.Executable
Description: Main entry point of the PokeCollector application.
main(String[]) - Static method in class ui.Executable
Description: Main entry point of the PokeCollector application.
MatrixHandler - Class in model
Description: The MatrixHandler class provides utility methods to generate and manipulate matrices, as well as generate unique IDs based on rarity.
MatrixHandler() - Constructor for class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Default constructor for the MatrixHandler class.
matrixToString(String[][]) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Converts a 2D String matrix into a formatted String ready for console printing.
model - package model
 
modifyCard(int, String, String, String, String, double) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Modifies the information of an existing card in the Pokedex.
modifyCardInfo() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Allows the user to modify the information of an existing card.
modifyCardInfo() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Allows the user to modify the information of an existing card.

R

Rarity - Enum in model
Description: Represents the rarity levels of Pokémon cards.
registerCard(String, String, String, String, double) - Method in class model.Controller
Description: Registers a new Pokémon card in the Pokedex.
registerCard() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Captures card information from the user and registers a new Card object.
registerCard() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Captures card information from the user and registers a new Card object.

S

setExpansion(String) - Method in class model.Card
Description: Sets the expansion set of the card.
setName(String) - Method in class model.Card
Description: Sets the name of the card.
setPrice(double) - Method in class model.Card
Description: Sets the price of the card.
setRarity(Rarity) - Method in class model.Card
Description: Sets the rarity level of the card.
setType(Type) - Method in class model.Card
Description: Sets the type of the card.
showCardInfo() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Displays the information of a registered card selected by the user.
showCardInfo() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Displays the information of a registered card selected by the user.
showCollectionByType() - Method in class ui.Executable
 
showCollectionByType() - Method in class ui.Executable
 
showCollectionByTypeAndRarity() - Method in class ui.Executable
 
showCollectionByTypeAndRarity() - Method in class ui.Executable
 
showMenu() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Displays the main menu and handles user option selection.
showMenu() - Method in class ui.Executable
Description: Displays the main menu and handles user option selection.

T

toString() - Method in class model.Card
Description: Returns a string representation of the card with all its information.
traverseMatrixN(String[][]) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Traverses a matrix in a "N" shape starting from the bottom-left cell.
traverseMatrixO(String[][]) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Traverses a matrix in an "O" shape starting from the bottom-right cell.
traverseMatrixX(String[][]) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Traverses a matrix in an "X" shape starting from the top-left cell.
traverseMatrixZ(String[][]) - Method in class model.MatrixHandler
Description: Traverses a matrix in a "Z" shape starting from the top-left cell.
Type - Enum in model
Description: Represents the different types of Pokémon cards.

U

ui - package ui
 

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum model.Rarity
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum model.Type
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum model.Rarity
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum model.Type
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
